misc: Loves basketball even more than Marcus, making some fans wonder if he's a real golfer
biography: Pasi, affectionately known as "Susi-Pasi" among his peers, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, representing Vuosaari Golf Helsinki with pride. With four past appearances, Pasi has proven his dedication to this esteemed tournament. His single victory in past years stands as a testament to his prowess on the course.

While golf is undoubtedly a significant part of Pasi's life, he harbors an even greater passion for basketball—perhaps even more so than Marcus. This has led some fans to playfully question whether Pasi is truly a golfer at heart. Nevertheless, Pasi's commitment to the Hector Trophée is clear, even though he is not participating in the 2026 event, his presence is missed, and a last-minute change could always see him back in action.
